overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring neon-lit glass skyscrapers, futuristic vehicle traffic, and reflective wet streets. The footage is from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077 style) with high-fidelity cinematic rendering and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with yellow striped crosswalk

events.description: purple truck and teal sports car speed through the intersection
black compact van drives across the crosswalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk observing the flow of futuristic traffic before beginning to cross

notable_agents.action: purple truck with glowing accents driving through intersection
teal sports car speeding past the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes reflecting neon lights
towering futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and holographic displays
large glowing advertisements with cyan and magenta hues on building facades
elevated glass-enclosed walkway connecting buildings across the street
rain-slicked road surface reflecting the neon lights of the city

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic urban intersection at night, standing on a yellow-striped crosswalk. Neon-lit glass skyscrapers tower overhead while various futuristic vehicles—including a purple truck and teal sports car—speed through the wet streets. The atmosphere is pure cyberpunk with heavy neon lighting reflecting off the rain-soaked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk with elevated concrete barrier

events.description: steps off the crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk and begins turning left
completes left turn to follow the curved sidewalk alongside the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning left onto the sidewalk, navigating around the curve

notable_agents.action: woman in futuristic revealing outfit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wet reflective pedestrian walkway with red accent lines
tall curved retaining wall separating sidewalk from lower level
tall modern street lights with multiple illuminated panels

segments.scene_description: Leaving the crosswalk behind, the camera moves onto a curved concrete sidewalk bordered by an orange concrete barrier on the left. A pedestrian in futuristic attire walks past in the opposite direction. The pedestrian overpass looms closer ahead while the glass towers shift to the right side of the frame.

events.description: pedestrian in yellow jacket passes by on the right side of the frame
approaching the pedestrian overpass which now dominates the center of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the pedestrian overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the wet concrete sidewalk flanked by the orange barrier, with the pedestrian overpass growing larger in the center of the frame. Occasional pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. The neon billboards on the left become more prominent as the camera advances toward the covered section of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under transit bridge with digital storefronts

events.description: passing underneath the pedestrian overpass, temporarily entering a covered area
emerging from under the overpass into open street with bright storefront displays

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the overpass, with vehicles visible on the street to the right

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens and neon signs on building walls

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the pedestrian overpass, briefly entering a sheltered area before emerging back into the open street. Digital storefront billboards line the left wall while futuristic vehicles continue to pass on the wet street to the right. The glass skyscrapers return to the center of the distant view as the walk continues through the neon-lit city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon intersection through a sheltered urban corridor and back into the open expanse of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on a yellow-striped crosswalk where purple and teal futuristic vehicles speed past beneath towering glass skyscrapers and rain-soaked asphalt. As the camera leaves the intersection, the view shifts onto a curved concrete sidewalk bordered by an orange barrier, passing pedestrians while the skyscrapers drift to the right of the frame. The scene then narrows as the camera advances toward a looming pedestrian overpass, with neon billboards on the left becoming increasingly prominent. Finally, the camera passes beneath the sheltered overpass and emerges back into the open street, gliding past digital storefronts as the distant glass towers return to the center of the neon-lit horizon.
